title: Anwraith's Renewables
description: A Datapack that introduces easier ways to mass-produce items for vanilla Minecraft, either through crafting or mob drops.
body:
## Description

This is a data pack for 1.20 and higher in Minecraft that allows for easier automation and crafting of resources that are needed on a large scale for buildings. These items are either non-renewable in vanilla or only renewable through non-bulk methods, such as villager trading or archaelogy. This data pack solves said issues by making the item craftable with farmable materials or adding it as a mob drop to specialized vanilla mobs.
